tools.name: search_ai_laws
tools.description: Full-text search over the audited AI-regulation dataset (US state + federal, EU, global) by title and summary. Returns matching law records with jurisdiction, status, and the official source URL. Data by AI Law Tracker (CC BY 4.0). Informational only — not legal advice.

tools.name: list_ai_laws
tools.description: List AI-regulation records with filters (scope, jurisdiction, status, in_force, updated_since, keyword q), sorting and pagination. Use this to browse laws for a place; use search_ai_laws for free-text search. Data by AI Law Tracker (CC BY 4.0). Informational only — not legal advice.

tools.name: get_ai_law
tools.description: Fetch a single AI-law record by its stable id (the id field from search_ai_laws / list_ai_laws). Data by AI Law Tracker (CC BY 4.0). Informational only — not legal advice.

tools.name: get_law_history
tools.description: Full change history for one law record — every observed snapshot (ascending), with what changed and the values at each point. Paid feature (Developer+): anon/free receive a 403 with an upgrade hint, which is returned verbatim. Data by AI Law Tracker (CC BY 4.0). Informational only — not legal advice

tools.name: get_law_sources
tools.description: The primary/secondary source URLs backing one law record — its own official (.gov) link plus the curated jurisdiction sources, each tiered. Basic tiers (anon/free) get PRIMARY sources only; Developer+ get the full set incl. secondary/analysis links (the response carries an upgrade hint verbatim when

tools.name: get_law_citations
tools.description: The citation projection for one law record: its identifier, title, audited alternate names, and a formatting-convenience suggested citation over public metadata (clearly labelled — never presented as an official cite). Free at every tier. No fabrication. Data by AI Law Tracker (CC BY 4.0). Informati

tools.name: list_recent_changes
tools.description: Unified changelog: time-ordered inserts/updates across the whole dataset. Poll with `since` = the previous response meta.cursor. Paid feature (Developer+); the lookback window is clamped per tier. Data by AI Law Tracker (CC BY 4.0). Informational only — not legal advice.

tools.name: list_law_feed
tools.description: A lean, human-scannable stream of the newest significant AI-law changes (inserts + real field changes, no value diffs). Paid feature (Developer+). Data by AI Law Tracker (CC BY 4.0). Informational only — not legal advice.

tools.name: list_ai_law_news
tools.description: The audited AI-regulation news feed: headline + short excerpt + publisher + source URL (never full article text). Free/anon get a taste (fewer results, newest only, excerpt withheld); Developer+ gets the full archive with excerpts. Data by AI Law Tracker (CC BY 4.0). Informational only — not legal a

tools.name: list_jurisdictions
tools.description: All covered jurisdictions (US states, US federal, EU, and countries) with record counts. Use the returned slugs for the `jurisdiction` argument of other tools. Data by AI Law Tracker (CC BY 4.0). Informational only — not legal advice.

tools.name: list_us_states
tools.description: US state jurisdictions with AI-law record counts. Data by AI Law Tracker (CC BY 4.0). Informational only — not legal advice.

tools.name: list_countries
tools.description: National (global-scope) jurisdictions with AI-law record counts. Data by AI Law Tracker (CC BY 4.0). Informational only — not legal advice.

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: Dataset facets: the distribution of record_type and scope across all records. Data by AI Law Tracker (CC BY 4.0). Informational only — not legal advice.

tools.name: list_sectors
tools.description: The sector index — valid `sector` slugs (with name, inherent risk and description) for get_ai_obligations, get_ai_penalties and assess_ai_compliance. Data by AI Law Tracker (CC BY 4.0). Informational only — not legal advice.

tools.name: get_sector_detail
tools.description: One sector’s cross-section: the free awareness OVERVIEW (name, inherent risk, enforcement bodies, federal penalty structure) PLUS the derived per-law obligations + penalties for that sector. The overview is open to every tier; the derived obligations/penalties are the salable interpreted layer (Pro+

tools.name: get_ai_deadlines
tools.description: The upcoming AI-law effective / compliance-date calendar, derived deterministically from the curated corpus (no LLM). Each entry carries the verbatim source deadline text + primary-source URL; jurisdictions whose deadline text has no explicit date are reported only as meta.undated (never given an in

tools.name: list_bills
tools.description: The curated landmark-bill index — the named, name-searchable AI laws (valid slugs for get_bill). Read from the primary-sourced landmark registry. Free at every tier. Data by AI Law Tracker (CC BY 4.0). Informational only — not legal advice.

tools.name: get_bill
tools.description: One curated landmark bill by slug: its core fields, tiered source URLs, citations (identifier + audited aka), and cross-links. Where a matching live record exists, the response binds the change-timeline link (use get_law_history). Served from the primary-sourced registry (no LLM); a missing binding

tools.name: get_ai_obligations
tools.description: The interpreted "what must I do" layer: who must do what, by when, or owe what penalty, for a jurisdiction and/or sector. Every obligation is grounded in a real law record + primary source (no LLM). Provide at least a jurisdiction or a sector. Paid feature (Pro+); lower tiers get a one-item preview

tools.name: get_ai_penalties
tools.description: The penalty & enforcement dataset for the applicable laws: monetary/other penalty, enforcing body, citation and primary source, plus a sector-level penalty-structure summary. Provide at least a jurisdiction or a sector. Paid feature (Developer+); lower tiers get a one-item preview. NOT legal advice.

tools.name: assess_ai_compliance
tools.description: The compliance-report engine (deterministic, no LLM — cannot hallucinate) as a tool. Give a business profile; get the applicable AI-law obligations plus a reproducible 1–10 risk score with a named factor breakdown. `state` and `sector` are required. Paid feature (Pro+); lower tiers get a preview (ri

tools.name: generate_compliance_report
tools.description: Generate the personalized, source-grounded AI-law COMPLIANCE REPORT for a business profile — the same deterministic engine behind the $79 report product (no LLM in the grounded path, so it cannot invent a statute, deadline, or penalty). Returns the risk assessment (1–10 score + applicable obligation

tools.name: get_api_status
tools.description: Liveness + backend status of the AI Law Tracker data API.

tools.name: start_checkout
tools.description: Create a hosted checkout link to upgrade to a paid API plan (developer $29, pro $99, business $299 / month). Returns a checkout_url the user opens in a browser; payment happens on our own checkout, and on success the user's API key is upgraded automatically. Does not modify any data.

tools.name: create_free_key
tools.description: Mint a FREE-tier API key and email it to the given address (the key is also returned once here). Paste that key into the connector's x-api-key header to unlock full fields, filters and higher limits. One active free key per email.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: search_ai_laws, get_law_sources, list_law_feed, list_ai_law_news, get_ai_deadlines, get_bill · Private data: search_ai_laws, list_ai_laws, get_ai_law, get_law_history, get_law_sources, get_law_citations, list_jurisdictions, list_us_states, list_countries, list_categories, get_sector_detail, get_bill, get_ai_obligations, start_checkout, create_free_key · Public sink: create_free_key · Destructive: get_ai_deadlines, start_checkout.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: search_ai_laws, get_law_sources, list_law_feed, list_ai_law_news, get_ai_deadlines, get_bill · Private data: search_ai_laws, list_ai_laws, get_ai_law, get_law_history, get_law_sources, get_law_citations, list_jurisdictions, list_us_states, list_countries, list_categories, get_sector_detail, get_bill, get_ai_obligations, start_checkout, create_free_key · Public sink: create_free_key · Destructive: get_ai_deadlines, start_checkout

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
